onboarding.welcomeBody: Geminyx is a chat-style browser for the “small web,” built on the Gemini protocol. It’s the web without intrusive ads.
onboarding.capsulesBody: A capsule is a small website. When you open it, you land in a thread that looks like a messenger chat.
onboarding.threadsBody: A thread is your interaction with a capsule. Each page of the site is a separate message in the thread. Every file can be viewed or downloaded.
onboarding.accountsBody: Everything is stored on this device—even offline. One database you can export and move to another device. All of it in a single file.

capsules.emptyBody: Capsules are named spaces for your chats—each keeps its own thread and history. Tap + above to create one and start a conversation.
capsules.emptyA11y: No capsules yet. Capsules are named spaces for your chats. Tap add in the header to create one.
capsules.deleteMsgSingleNamed: Delete “{{name}}” and all messages? This cannot be undone.
capsules.deleteMsgSingleGeneric: This will remove the capsule, thread, and all messages. This cannot be undone.
capsules.deleteMsgMany: This will remove the selected capsules, threads, and all messages. This cannot be undone.
capsules.noAccountBody: Select an account before managing categories.
capsules.errorAddToLibrary: Could not add capsule to your library.
capsules.deleteCapsuleMsg: Delete “{{name}}” and all messages? This cannot be undone.
capsules.addNoAccountBody: Select an account before adding a capsule.

capsuleCreate.missingUrlBody: Enter a Gemini URL for this capsule.

threads.deleteMsgSingleNamed: Delete “{{name}}” and all messages? The capsule stays in your library. This cannot be undone.
threads.deleteMsgSingleGeneric: This will remove the thread and all messages. The capsule stays in your library. This cannot be undone.
threads.deleteMsgMany: This will remove the selected threads and all messages. Capsules stay in your library. This cannot be undone.
threads.openUrlPromptMsg: Paste a gemini:// URL to open or start a thread.
threads.androidUrlHint: Paste a gemini:// URL to open or start a thread.
threads.urlInvalidBodyPrefix: The URL must start with gemini://.
threads.urlInvalidBodyParse: Could not parse this URL. Check the format.
threads.emptyBody: Threads are your ongoing conversations with each capsule. Open a capsule to start chatting—recent threads will show up here for quick access.
threads.emptyA11y: No threads yet. Open a capsule to chat; recent threads appear here.

thread.busyMsg: Please wait for the current request to finish.
thread.noCapsuleUrlBody: Add a Gemini URL to this capsule to fetch.
thread.deleteMsgNamed: Delete “{{name}}” and all messages? The capsule stays in your library. This cannot be undone.
thread.deleteMsgGeneric: This will remove the thread and all messages. The capsule stays in your library. This cannot be undone.
thread.noAccountBody: Add or select an account first.
thread.certGenMessage: This may take up to 2.5 minutes. We’ll cancel if it takes longer.

attachment.title: Attachment
attachment.errorNoCache: File cache is not available on this device.
attachment.errorNoSharing: Sharing is not available on this device.
attachment.otherTypeHint: Preview is not available for this type. Use Share file to open or save it in another app.

validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email or leave blank

accountCreate.embedSubtitle: This profile is stored only on this device. You can add more accounts later in Settings.

accountEdit.deleteMsg: This removes the account from this device. It does not affect any remote servers.

categories.title: Categories
categories.hint: General is the default for capsules without a category. It is not listed here.
categories.deleteMsg: “{{name}}” will be removed. Capsules in this category move to General.

certificateScreen.introHint: Optional PKCS#12 (.p12) for servers that require TLS client authentication. On iOS, the native Gemini fetch can use this certificate.
certificateScreen.statusConfigured: A certificate is configured for this account.
certificateScreen.exportNoCache: File cache is not available on this device.
certificateScreen.exportNoSharing: Sharing is not available on this device.
certificateScreen.importReadError: Could not read the selected file.
certificateScreen.importSuccessMsg: PKCS#12 saved. It will be used for Gemini requests from this account.
certificateScreen.removeMsg: Gemini requests will no longer use a client certificate for this account.

developerScreen.localDbHint: Export or import the WatermelonDB SQLite file (geminyx.db). Import replaces the file on disk; use backups from trusted sources only.
developerScreen.eraseHint: Erase removes all local data in SQLite. You will return to onboarding.
developerScreen.eraseNotAvailable: Local database erase is not available on web.
developerScreen.importMsg: This replaces the local SQLite file with the file you pick. Unsaved work in memory may be lost. The app reloads in development; in release builds you may need to force-quit and reopen.
developerScreen.eraseMsg: All accounts, capsules, threads, and messages on this device will be removed. You will return to onboarding.

codeBlock.errorImageRendering: Image is still rendering. Try again in a moment.

capsuleForm.name: Name
capsuleForm.a11yEmojiHint: Opens the emoji keyboard with search, categories, and skin tones

validation.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 500 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.switchAccountSubtitle: Choose another profile or add one

cert.clientRequiredMsg: This capsule requires a client certificate. Generate one for this account now?
cert.clientCertGenerateFail: Could not generate a client certificate.
cert.shareMsg: To access this capsule, Geminyx must present your account’s client certificate during the TLS handshake. Allow this for this thread?

astrobotany.description: A community gardening experience in geminispace

tildeTeam.description: A digital community for socializing, learning, and making cool stuff

iich.description: A simple text-based bulletin board modeled after 2ch

capcomFeeds.description: A public aggregator of subscribable Gemini pages and Gemini Atom feeds

gemiDev.description: Various services for Gemini like Gemipedia or Wayback machine

myGeminiSpace.description: A public gemini hosting service that uses a web front-end for content authoring
